text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Ines Fujin invites me to visit the
amusement park where she works part-time, so I
drop by to see how she's doing.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, kiddos, let's all give the hero of the park,
Park Knight, a nice loud welcome! On the count
of three—one, two...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Park Kniiight!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? Okay, let's try that one more time! Park
Kniiight!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, give me a second, everyone! I'll just go
check up on Park Knight's battle status!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like something's going on backstage...
Worried, I go over to check the situation.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Th-the mascot actor suddenly got sick?!

text_block_list.name: Amusement Park Staff
text_block_list.text:
He's currently cooped up in the restroom with
stomachache... It doesn't look like it'll last too
long, but could you buy us some time until we can
sort this out?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Buy some time? I dunno... The only time I ever go
on stage is to do my winning concert dance
routine.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And that's a totally different livey-vibey from a
superhero show. Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hold it right there! Is it true that Park Knight is in
trouble?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! ...Wait, Biko?! And how come you're here
too, Trainer?! This area's off-limits to guests!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah, it is an emergency, but—wait a sec,
we really need to figure out the stage situation!
Maybe we should just tell everyone the truth
and—

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
It's Park Knight's duty as the hero of this
amusement park to bring joy to the children,
right?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Y-yeah, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Then we mustn't let the children down! They've
come all the way here to cheer for Park Knight!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. Telling the truth would only
disappoint the kids and their parents.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I really don't want to make these families sad on
their day out together. I might not be a hero,
but...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to put on an entertaining performance for
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...But how? This isn't a winning concert, so I'm not
sure how well my dance would go down.
choice_data_list:
How about incorporating your dance number
into the hero show?
An Ines-style dance would be best.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
A hero-style dance number... That could be fun!
Biko, could you give me a hand?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Listen, everyone! We've got a situation! Park
Knight's in a real crisis!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, it's all my fault... Park Knight got captured
by the enemy leader to save my life!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear that, everyone? You know what this
means, right? We have to cheer for Park Knight!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Let's all dance together! I'm sure the power of
dance will help save Park Knight!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You've got this, Park Knight!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: You're super tough, Park Knight!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right, everyone, show me your biggest smiles!
All your smiles will boost Park Knight's power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The hero show is a great success, with Ines Fujin's
performance perfectly covering for the park
mascot's absence.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
An Ines-style dance... Yeah. I practice all the time
to make my fans smile! This should be a piece of
cake!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, watch this, you two! Ines is taking the
stage!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Attention, all guests. There has been a slight
change of schedule today, but please enjoy this
mini dance show!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm back, everyone! Park Knight will be back in
action soon, but until then, let's all sing and
dance together!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: One, two, three! One, two, three!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...And then finish with a spin! Okay, got that?
Now let's add some lyrics to this dance!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: One, t-two, three, and turn... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Awesome! That's perfect!
Okay, let's all become dancing superstars and
give Park Knight a big surprise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The hero show is a great success, with Ines Fujin's
performance perfectly covering for the park
mascot's absence.
